name: How To Add A Call-To-Action Button On Facebook
description: Adding a Call-To-Action (CTA) button to Facebook page makes it much easier for people to engage with your business. Here’s a step-by-step guide to help you do just that.
main_title: How To Add A Call-To-Action Button On Facebook
richtext:
Putting up a Facebook page for your business is essential for social media engagement. But when potential clients land up on your Facebook page, how do you make it easier for them to interact with your business?

This is where Call- To- Action (CTA) buttons come into the picture. By using CTA buttons, you can enable anyone who’s viewing your business’ Facebook page to:

  • Contact your business, either through Messenger, email, phone, or your website.
  • Shop for products
  • Order food
  • Book a service

That being said, how do you add a CTA to your business’ Facebook page? Well, that’s what we’re here to show you. Read on to know more.

Step 1:

Login to your business’ Facebook page.

Step 2:

In the ‘Page’ section, click on the ‘Add a Button’ option right below your cover picture.

Step 3:

Now you will have to select what action you want the button to perform. You’ll be given a list of options in the dialog box that appears. Choose the action you want and click on ‘Next’.

Step 4:

In this step, you will have to select where you want the button to send people to. For example, if you chose the ‘Contact Us’ action in the previous step, now you will have to decide how people can contact you – by phone, mail, or your website. Once you select that, click on ‘Finish’.

Step 5:

Once you’ve done that, Facebook will show you a preview of what your CTA button will look like. You can make edits to the actions here if required. Once everything is set, click on ‘Finish’, and you’re done!
join_title: Spend More Time Running Your Business
join_description: And, less time obsessing about your local presence
